nasb.text: Thus there fell ten portions to Manasseh, besides the land of Gilead and Bashan, which is beyond the Jordan,

esv.text: Thus there fell to Manasseh ten portions, besides the land of Gilead and Bashan, which is on the other side of the Jordan,

cnv.text: 這樣，除了約旦河東的基列和巴珊地之外，還有十份地業歸屬瑪拿西。

ccb.text: 除了约旦河东的基列和巴珊两地以外，玛拿西人还分到十块土地，
